rationale.fidelity: Exactly preserves the deterministic morning assignment, known inputs, compatibility, hours, exclusivity, and scheduled-value objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes scarce qualified hours and their opportunity cost concrete and decision-relevant.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Avoids unsupported novelty; no literature relationship is developed because none is supplied or requested.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly excludes emergency arrivals, rejects robustness claims, and identifies the evidence and model extension needed.
rationale.overall: An exceptionally faithful resource-allocation framing with strong scope discipline.
